description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Begin a new debt consolidation personal loan application requesting $8,000 with a fixed rate and 36-month term, choose an offer with APR under 12%, continue to the employment information step, and ensure automatic payments are enabled.
tasks.name: Begin a new debt consolidation personal loan application requesting $8,000 with a fixed rate and 36-month term, choose an offer with APR under 12%, continue to the employment information step, and ensure automatic payments are enabled.

tasks.instruction: For a $6,000 credit card consolidation loan with a 48-month term, open the first two recommended offers, compare their total repayment amounts, and save as favorite the offer with the lower total repayment.
tasks.name: For a $6,000 credit card consolidation loan with a 48-month term, open the first two recommended offers, compare their total repayment amounts, and save as favorite the offer with the lower total repayment.
tasks.description: For a $6,000 credit card consolidation loan with a 48-month term, open the first two recommended offers, compare their total repayment amounts, and save as favorite the offer with the lower total repayment.

tasks.instruction: Use the eligibility checker for a 60-month home improvement loan, adjust the loan amount until the estimated monthly payment is the highest possible value that remains under $300, then view eligible offers and start pre-approval for the top offer.
tasks.name: Use the eligibility checker for a 60-month home improvement loan, adjust the loan amount until the estimated monthly payment is the highest possible value that remains under $300, then view eligible offers and start pre-approval for the top offer.

tasks.instruction: While signed in, open your incomplete car repair loan application, reduce the requested loan amount in $500 steps until the estimated monthly payment falls below $250, and then save the updated draft.
tasks.name: While signed in, open your incomplete car repair loan application, reduce the requested loan amount in $500 steps until the estimated monthly payment falls below $250, and then save the updated draft.
tasks.description: While signed in, open your incomplete car repair loan application, reduce the requested loan amount in $500 steps until the estimated monthly payment falls below $250, and then save the updated draft.

tasks.instruction: For an active personal loan in your account, set a monthly due date between the 1st and 10th, select the saved checking account ending in 1234 as the payment method, enable autopay, set email reminders to 3 days before each due date, and save the changes.
tasks.name: For an active personal loan in your account, set a monthly due date between the 1st and 10th, select the saved checking account ending in 1234 as the payment method, enable autopay, set email reminders to 3 days before each due date, and save the changes.

tasks.instruction: Search home improvement loan offers between $12,000 and $15,000 that have no origination fee and no prepayment penalty, choose an offer with a term of 36 months or less, and proceed through the application until the review step without submitting.
tasks.name: Search home improvement loan offers between $12,000 and $15,000 that have no origination fee and no prepayment penalty, choose an offer with a term of 36 months or less, and proceed through the application until the review step without submitting.
tasks.description: Search home improvement loan offers between $12,000 and $15,000 that have no origination fee and no prepayment penalty, choose an offer with a term of 36 months or less, and proceed through the application until the review step without submitting.

tasks.instruction: Use the personal loan calculator for a $10,000 loan at 9% APR, test 24-, 36-, and 48-month terms until you find one whose monthly payment is between $200 and $220, then save this scenario for later reference.

tasks.instruction: Open your profile settings, update your contact phone number and mailing address, then set in-app notifications as the primary communication method while turning off SMS messages and save the changes.

tasks.instruction: From your draft home improvement loan application, add a co-applicant and recalculate offers, then filter to offers with APR under 15%, sort them by loan amount from high to low, and continue with the highest loan amount offer.

target_names: Co-applicant Alex Rivera for Home Improvement Draft
